service.description: Create an authenticated session from username/password and return the explicit Moqui login-key token darpan-ui sends on later requests.

parameter.name: username
parameter.description: Account username used for pilot login.

parameter.name: password
parameter.description: Account password used for pilot login.

parameter.name: ok
parameter.description: True when the login attempt completed without facade errors.

parameter.name: messages
parameter.description: Informational messages emitted during login handling.

parameter.name: errors
parameter.description: Validation or authentication errors for the login attempt.

parameter.name: authenticated
parameter.description: True when the session is authenticated after the login attempt.

parameter.name: authToken
parameter.description: Explicit login-key token that darpan-ui sends on later requests through the `login_key` header.

parameter.name: authTokenType
parameter.description: Token scheme identifier. Current value: `LOGIN_KEY`.

parameter.name: authTokenHeaderName
parameter.description: Request header name darpan-ui must send for stateless auth. Current value: `login_key`.

parameter.name: authTokenExpiresInSeconds
parameter.description: Approximate token lifetime in seconds, derived from the Moqui login-key expiry.

parameter.name: sessionInfo
parameter.description: Authenticated session metadata returned to darpan-ui.

service.description: Return session metadata for darpan-ui route guards. Moqui resolves the request user from the explicit `login_key` header when present.

parameter.name: ok
parameter.description: True when the session info lookup completed without facade errors.

parameter.name: messages
parameter.description: Informational messages emitted during session-info lookup.

parameter.name: errors
parameter.description: Errors returned while resolving session state.

parameter.name: authenticated
parameter.description: True when the current request resolves to an authenticated session.

parameter.name: sessionInfo
parameter.description: Authenticated session metadata returned to darpan-ui.

service.description: Revoke the explicit login-key token from the current request and terminate any active authenticated session.

parameter.name: ok
parameter.description: True when logout cleanup completed without facade errors.

parameter.name: messages
parameter.description: Informational messages emitted during logout handling.

parameter.name: errors
parameter.description: Errors returned while clearing session state.

parameter.name: authenticated
parameter.description: Always false after logout cleanup finishes.

parameter.name: authTokenRevoked
parameter.description: True when logout removed the matching `UserLoginKey` record for the supplied auth token.
